posting.sourceTitle: United Union of Roofers, Waterproofers JAC LU #154
posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee for Roofers, Waterproofers, and Allied Workers, Local Union #154
posting.unionName: United Union for Roofers, Waterproofers and Allied Workers, Local Union #154
posting.locationSummary: Hauppauge, NY area; applicants must live in Nassau or Suffolk counties
posting.applicationSummary: Obtain applications in person at Roofers Local Union #154 in Hauppauge during the listed weekday hours, then make sure the completed application is received by April 20, 2027.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Roofers Local Union #154, 370 Vanderbilt Motor Parkway, Suite 1 Rear, Hauppauge, NY 11788
posting.applicationHours: 3:00 p.m. to 5:00 p.m. on Tuesdays and Thursdays, excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must reside within the jurisdiction of Local Union #154 at the time of application, which includes Nassau and Suffolk counties.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.classRequirement: Must attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma (such as TASC or GED).
Must pass a physical examination, at the expense of the sponsor, after selection and prior to enrollment in the apprenticeship.
Must have reliable means of transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
Must reside within the jurisdiction of Local Union #154 at the time of application, which includes Nassau and Suffolk counties.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, have a high school diploma or equivalency, live in Nassau or Suffolk counties, and have reliable transportation. A physical exam is required after selection.
posting.contactName: United Union for Roofers, Waterproofers and Allied Workers, Local Union #154
posting.contactSummary: For more information, contact United Union for Roofers, Waterproofers and Allied Workers, Local Union #154 at (631) 435-0655.
